title: Australian Vegan Sausage Bake
description: A flavorful vegan sausage bake recipe with a crispy top and a delicious, savory filling. Perfect for a hearty meal or a comforting snack.
instructions: Slice the onion and sweet potato into 1-inch pieces.
Place the sausages on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with a little oil and cook in the oven for 15 minutes.
While the sausages are cooking, toss the sliced onion and sweet potato with some oil and your favorite herbs.
Spread the mixture out on a separate baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes, or until tender.
After the sausages have cooked for 15 minutes, add the roasted onion and sweet potato to the baking sheet.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the sausages are cooked through and the top is crispy.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Enjoy your delicious Australian Vegan Sausage Bake!
